// app.js
const express = require('express');
const app = express();
app.use(express.json());

// 🔴 Hardcoded API key (vulnerability #3)
const INTERNAL_API_KEY = "SECRET-12345-INTERNAL-KEY";

// Mock database
const sensitiveData = {
  users: ["alice", "bob", "admin"],
  secrets: ["db_password=pass123", "jwt_secret=supersecret"]
};

// 🔴 Low severity: Debug endpoint exposing config (vulnerability #1)
app.get('/debug/config', (req, res) => {
  res.json({
    appName: "VulnerableApp",
    version: "1.0.0",
    internalApiKey: INTERNAL_API_KEY, // exposed secret
    environment: "production"
  });
});

// 🔴 Medium severity: Missing proper authorization (vulnerability #2)
app.get('/admin/export', (req, res) => {
  const apiKey = req.headers['x-api-key'];

  // ❌ Only checks API key, no user role validation
  if (apiKey === INTERNAL_API_KEY) {
    return res.json({
      message: "Export successful",
      data: sensitiveData
    });
  }

  res.status(403).json({ error: "Forbidden" });
});

// Normal route
app.get('/', (req, res) => {
  res.send("Welcome to Vulnerable App");
});

app.listen(3000, () => {
  console.log("App running on http://localhost:3000");
});
